sql: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE CASE WHEN #{includeInactive} = true THEN status IN (#{ids}) ELSE status = 'active' AND id IN (#{ids}) END
templateSql:
SELECT id, name FROM users
<if test="includeInactive == true">
    WHERE status IN
</if>
<if test="includeInactive == false">
    WHERE status = 'active' AND id IN
</if>
<if test="ids != null">
    <foreach collection="ids" item="id" open="(" separator="," close=")">
        #{id}
    </foreach>
</if>
